kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

test.name: TC_UI_001 หน้า Login โหลดได้สำเร็จและแสดง Element ครบถ้วน

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.msg: Current page contains text 'เข้าสู่ระบบ'.
kw.arg: เข้าสู่ระบบ
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

test.doc: ตรวจสอบว่าหน้า Login มี Element พื้นฐานครบ ได้แก่ หัวข้อ, Input username, Input password, ปุ่ม Submit

test.name: TC_UI_002 Login สำเร็จและ Redirect ไปหน้า Admin Dashboard

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Location Is
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL is ``expected``.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.msg: Current page contains text 'ระบบจัดการห้องพัก'.
kw.arg: ระบบจัดการห้องพัก
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

test.doc: ทดสอบ Login ด้วย Admin Credentials ที่ถูกต้อง ผลที่คาดหวัง: URL เปลี่ยนไป /admin และแสดงหน้า Dashboard

test.name: TC_UI_003 Login ล้มเหลวด้วย Password ผิดและแสดง Error Message

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Location Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that the current URL is exactly ``url``.

test.doc: ทดสอบว่าระบบแสดง Error เมื่อ Password ไม่ถูกต้อง ผลที่คาดหวัง: อยู่หน้า Login, เห็น Error แดง

test.name: TC_UI_004 เข้าหน้า Admin โดยไม่ Login ต้อง Redirect กลับหน้า Login

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Delete All Cookies
kw.doc: Deletes all cookies.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Location Contains
kw.msg: Location did not contain '/login' in 5 seconds.
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL contains ``expected``.
kw.status: Location did not contain '/login' in 5 seconds.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.arg: เข้าสู่ระบบ
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

test.doc: ทดสอบว่า ProtectedRoute ทำงานถูกต้อง ผลที่คาดหวัง: ถูก Redirect กลับ /login อัตโนมัติ
test.status: Location did not contain '/login' in 5 seconds.

test.name: TC_UI_005 Logout สำเร็จและ Redirect กลับหน้า Login

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Perform Admin Login
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.
Keyword สำหรับทำ Login ด้วย credentials ที่ระบุ

kw.name: Wait Until Location Is
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL is ``expected``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath=//button[contains(text(),'ออกจากระบบ')]'.
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Location Contains
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL contains ``expected``.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.msg: Current page contains text 'เข้าสู่ระบบ'.
kw.arg: เข้าสู่ระบบ
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

test.doc: ทดสอบการ Logout จาก Admin Dashboard

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
